analysis.reasoning: Core message: The EU Office to Hong Kong and Macao highlights a photo summarizing 10 years of EU diplomacy (#EEAS10), inviting readers to check the story behind it. Evaluation: EU1 (EU as a successful story): Implicitly supported—celebrating a decade of EU diplomacy suggests sustained achievement and positive legacy. EU2 (EU is united): Not indicated; no mention of unity or agreement among member states. EU3 (useful for its citizens): Not applicable; no reference to benefits within the EU. EU4 (avant‑garde actor): Not claimed; no pioneering policies or leadership cited. EU5 (global champion of fair causes): Not explicit; the tweet doesn’t mention human rights or similar causes. EU6 (EU contributes to a better world): Implicitly supported—framing a decade of EU diplomacy from a global post (Hong Kong/Macao) suggests EU’s ongoing international engagement and positive global role. Conclusion: EU1 and EU6 are promoted.
